history.text: The Greek War of Independence against the Ottoman Empire became the central struggle for Greece's independence and future statehood.
An official declaration asserted Greece's claim to sovereignty.
Third Hellenic Republic introduced a new form of state rule.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Greece.
